inputs.label: Number of Sides
inputs.businessContext: Number of sides of the regular polygon

inputs.label: Interior Angle
inputs.businessContext: Each interior angle of the polygon

inputs.label: Sum of Interior Angles
inputs.businessContext: Total sum of all interior angles

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding output

formulas.exteriorAngle: Math.round((sides > 0 ? 360/sides : interiorAngle > 0 ? 180 - interiorAngle : sumInteriorAngles > 0 ? 360/((sumInteriorAngles/180)+2) : exteriorAngleGiven > 0 ? exteriorAngleGiven : 0) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
formulas.interiorAngle: Math.round((180 - exteriorAngle) * Math.pow(10, precision)) / Math.pow(10, precision)
